'''Kels Turkorn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] thief living around [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] who partnered herself with [[Cecil Noone]]. She, along with Noone, the [[Sluissi]] [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] [[Hass Sonax]], and the [[Tynnan/Legends|Tynnan]] demolitions expert [[Dawson (Tynnan)|Dawson]] double-crossed their [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] employer after stealing a [[Hapan]] [[Gun of Command]] and made off with the luxury yacht ''[[Asaari Wind]]''.<ref name="Herdship Heist">{{JournalCite|15|The Great Herdship Heist}}</ref>

Later, on [[Kabal/Legends|Kabal]] she led the rescue of Noone from the estate of big game hunter [[Tyro Viveca/Legends|Tyro Viveca]] after negotiations for the sale of the Gun of Command went sour.<ref name="Fair Prey">{{GamerCite|1|Fair Prey}}</ref>
